disability_duration: AVM progressed over a few years
amputation_surgery: Combination of targeted muscle reinnervation and regenerative peripheral nerve interfaces.
phantom_position_and_mobility: Phantom hand positioned slightly above the elbow; only feels the hand, not the forearm; can move all phantom fingers.
session_pre2_timing: pre-amputation; second baseline scan approximately 24 hours after pre1
phantom_limb_sensation_frequency: 3m: once a week; 6m: several times per month; 1.5yr: once or less per month
limb_pain_frequency: Pre: all the time; 3m: several times per month; 6m: once or less per month; 1.5yr: once or less per month
pain_detect_pain_course: Persistent pain with pain attacks (same pre and 3m); persistent pain with slight fluctuations (6m, 1.5yr).

level_of_amputation: Traditional: sharply transected the nerves and allowed to retract.
amputation_surgery: Phantom hand positioned upright towards chest; only feels the hand, not the forearm; can move all phantom fingers.
session_pre1_timing: pre-amputation; second baseline scan approximately 24 hours after pre1
phantom_limb_sensation_intensity_3m_6m_p: 3m: all the time; 6m: all the time; 5yrs: all the time
limb_pain_intensity_pre_3m_6m_post3: Pre: all the time; 3m: daily; 6m: daily; 5yrs: all the time
pain_detect_score_pre_3m_6m_post3: Persistent pain with pain attacks (same pre and 6m); persistent pain with slight fluctuations (5yrs).
prosthesis_type: None. Briefly used in the first 6 months post-amputation (2 days a week, ~2 hours a day).

amputated_side: Severell-Martorell syndrome led to multi-fractured arm with bones not healing
level_of_amputation: Traditional: sharply transected the nerves and allowed to retract.
amputation_surgery: Phantom hand positioned upright towards chest; mostly hand and fingers (little elbow); can move all phantom fingers.
session_pre1_timing: pre-amputation; second baseline scan approximately 24 hours after pre1
limb_pain_intensity_pre_3m_6m_post3: Pre: daily; 3m: daily; 6m: once a week
pain_detect_score_pre_3m_6m_post3: Pain attacks with pain between them (pre); persistent pain with pain attacks (3m); pain attacks without pain between them (6m).
prosthesis_type: 6m: 2 days a week, 8 hours a day
